subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received in Alexandria at a time when I am utterly bereft of respite and infinitely weary [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت عهد نامه در اسکندریه رسید در حالتیکه ابدا مجال ندارم و بی نهایت خسته
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @past, present and future of Iran
